'''Sludd''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Alzarian/Legends|Alzarian]] [[General/Legends|First General]] to [[King/Legends|King]] [[Gokus]] of [[Alzar]]'s forces. He was behind an elaborate scheme to overthrow the king and conquer the nearby [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sooma]].

{{Char-stub}}
